name: KRAKacquisition Corp
summary: KRAKacquisition Corp (KRAQ) is a blank check special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) incorporated in the Cayman Islands with no operating history or revenues. Its business objective is to identify and complete an initial Business Combination, with a focus on the blockchain, digital asset, and broader financial technology sectors. Co-founded by Payward, Inc. (d/b/a Kraken), Natural Capital Sponsor I LLC, and Tribe Capital Management, LLC, the company raised funds via an Initial Public Offering and holds proceeds in a Trust Account.

products.name: Initial Public Offering Units
products.description: Units consisting of Class A Ordinary Shares and Public Warrants sold to public shareholders to fund a Business Combination.

products.name: Private Placement Warrants
products.description: Warrants issued to the Sponsor in a private placement simultaneously with the closing of the Initial Public Offering.

partnerships.description: Co-Founder of KRAKacquisition Corp, participating as an Initial Shareholder.
Co-Founder and Initial Shareholder of KRAKacquisition Corp.
Co-Founder and Initial Shareholder of KRAKacquisition Corp.
Trustee for the Trust Account under the Investment Management Trust Agreement dated January 28, 2026.
